entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `recipes` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT, `servings` INTEGER, `prepTimeMinutes` INTEGER, `cookTimeMinutes` INTEGER, `coverImageUri` TEXT, `cuisine` TEXT, `difficulty` TEXT, `recipeType` TEXT, `notes` TEXT, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `archivedAt` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
